details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article on Nobel laureates in Physics, extracted data from the page using browser automation tools, and correctly reported the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023) with accurate laureate names: 2025 - John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis; 2024 - John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton; 2023 - Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier. The data was extracted from actual page content, not hallucinated.
